owner_operator_stated: Dr. Eva Coggin, DDS, is described on the practice's own site as the dentist/practice owner; she relocated to the Chicago area/this practice after 10 years at Highpoint Dental Group in Romeoville.
notes: Address (235 Burlington Ave, Clarendon Hills, IL 60514) and phone ((630) 325-9298) confirmed on the practice's own site smileclarendonhills.com, which presents Dr. Coggin as the owner-operator. GROUP AFFILIATION FLAG: this exact same address and phone are ALSO listed by Pinnacle Dental Group (pinnacledentalgroup.com/clarendon-hills) as one of its three Illinois offices (Plainfield, Clarendon Hills, New Lenox), with Dr. Coggin named as its Clarendon Hills dentist — so this location functions as part of a small multi-location regional dental group, not a fully standalone solo LLC, even though the doctor/operator is consistent across both sites. No careers/hiring page found on either site.
